name: Noodles with Ricotta & Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil and add salt to taste. If using dried pasta, add it at this time; if fresh, wait until the sauce is ready.
2. Prepare a serving bowl or plates that are heated.
3. In a bowl, roughly mix ricotta cheese, butter, walnut oil, 1/4 cup walnuts, and grated Parmesan cheese. Thin with half-and-half, then stir in herbs (chives, chervil) and season with salt and pepper.
4. Transfer the mixture to a wide skillet. Gently warm the sauce over low flame.
5. Cook and drain the pasta, then add it directly to the pan with the ricotta mixture. Toss everything together well.
6. Place the contents in the heated serving bowl.
7. Scatter remaining walnuts over the pasta and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and plenty of freshly ground pepper.
